title: Luxuriantly Layered Dutch Trout Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful Dutch dish featuring trout, with earthy and juicy notes, perfect for a monsoon evening. This recipe is anti-inflammatory friendly and cooked in a traditional molcajete vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the trout fillets with salt, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and cayenne pepper.
Heat the olive oil in the molcajete over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the molcajete and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the molcajete and cook for an additional minute.
Add the seasoned trout fillets to the molcajete, skin side up.
Pour the chicken broth over the trout fillets and bring to a simmer.
Cover the molcajete with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 12 minutes or until the trout is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
